\begin{circuitikz}
    \draw (0,0)     node[op amp] (opamp) {}
    (opamp.+)       -- ++(-1,0)
                    node[ground] {}                   
    (opamp.-)       to[short, *-] ++(0,1) coordinate(tmp)
                    to[R, l^=$R_2$, i<^=$I_2$] (tmp -| opamp.out)
                    to[short, -*] (opamp.out)
    (opamp.-)       to[R, l_=$R_1$, i<^=$I_1$, -o] ++ (-2.5,0)
                    node[left] {$V_\text{in}$}
    (opamp.out)     to[short,-o] ++(1,0)
                    node[right] {$V_\text{out}$};          
\end{circuitikz}
